generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. When we commit to our partners, we're not just spending money - we're ensuring early warnings, shared intelligence, and collective deterrence that keeps all of us safer. My sister serves in the military, and she tells me how much stronger our position is because of these partnerships. We can't afford to weaken them now. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
